About The Floor

BUILT FOR
PEOPLE WHO
SHOW UP

Shiv Shakti Fitness is a strength-and-conditioning floor, not a treadmill museum. Machines, free weights and a dedicated cardio corner sit under one roof, lined with mirrors so your form gets checked by you, not just your trainer.

Turf-lined walkways, a fully air-conditioned space and a coach on the floor every session — this is a gym built around training, not around selling you a tour.

MODESTRENGTH + CARDIO
CLIMATEAIR-CONDITIONED
FLOORANTI-SLIP TURF
FOCUSFORM. FUEL. FOLLOW-THROUGH
What You Can Train

TRAIN EVERY
WAY YOU SHOW UP

01

Strength Training

Machines, free weights and bench-press racks for building real, measurable strength.

02

Cardio & Fat Loss

Treadmills, cross-trainers and cycles for conditioning, endurance and fat loss work.

03

Personal Training

One-on-one coaching with form correction and a plan built around your goal.

04

Group & Functional Training

Circuit-style sessions and partner drills for people who train better with company.

05

Nutrition & Supplement Guidance

Diet inputs and supplement guidance from your trainers, matched to your training load.

06

Transformation Coaching

Structured plans for fat loss, muscle gain or recomposition — built around your starting point.

On The Floor

WHAT YOU'LL
ACTUALLY FIND HERE

Central Air-Conditioning

The whole floor stays cool through every set, every season.

Mirror-Lined Training Floor

Check your form yourself, not just on your trainer's word.

Anti-Slip Turf Walkways

Clean, hygienic flooring running between every station.

Strength + Dedicated Cardio Zone

Free weights, machines and cardio under the same roof.

A Coach On The Floor

Real attention during your session, not just at sign-up.

An Active Community

Follow along and see the floor in action on Instagram & YouTube.
